task.raw_text: Template kernel for domain national_banking_os and role emotion.

law_of_law.description: Emotion diagnostics must obey canonical UBI laws and AMOS_CORE behaviour constraints.

rule_of_2.description: Always hold an action_path and a halt_or_restructure_path for any emotional decision.

rule_of_4.description: Map each emotional pattern across biological, experiential, logical and systemic axes.
